title: Bare Bones x Leaf Litter
description: Enjoy leaf litter for earlier versions, with Bare Bones style ! 🍂
body:
This pack is a Bare Bones version of [Leaf Litter Backport](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/leaf-litter-backport) !

You can place it above [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) in the resource pack list

**[Continuity mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) is required**

Leaf litter spawns only in forest and dark forest biomes
